policy_name: Star Health Family Health Optima Insurance Plan

uin_code.source_quote: Family Health Optima Insurance Plan | UIN : SHAHLIP26046V092526

min_entry_age.source_quote: Family includes Insured Person, Spouse / Live in partner / Same Sex partner, dependent children between 16 days and 25 years of age

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured options of ₹10 L and above only

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: ment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the ﬁrst policy with insurer

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 6. Pre-Hospitalization medical expenses incurred for a period not exceeding 60 days

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: nder the policy. 7. Post-Hospitalization medical expenses incurred for a period of 90 days from the date of discharge from the hospital towards Consul

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Star Health day-care procedures page; 540+ procedures)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment: Inpatient Hospitalizations Expenses incurred on treatment under Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines in a AYUSH Hospital is payable up to the Sum Insured.

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: 14. Loyalty Bonus: For the Sum Insured options Rs.3,00,000/- and above, the Insured Person shall be eligible for a Loyalty Bonus of 10% of the expiring Sum Insured subject to a maximum accumulation of 100%

restoration_benefit.source_quote: Automatic Restoration is available 3 times at 100% each time, during the Policy Period

room_rent_capping.value: Per eligible room category in Policy Schedule (proportionate deduction if higher room category opted)

copayment_pct.source_quote: Co-payment of 20% of each and every claim amount for fresh as well as renewal policies for Insured Persons whose age at the time of entry is 61 years and abo

network_hospital_count.source_note: 14,000+ network hospitals across India (per official Star Health communications, scraped 2026-05-15)

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility: Cashless facility means a facility extended by the insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the insured in accordance with the Policy Terms and conditions, are directly made to the network provider by the insurer to t

policy_type.source_quote: Cancer Care requiring medical assistance g

_meta.notes: Star Health FHO: 60/90 pre/post hospitalization (post = 90 days, shorter than many peers' 180). Auto Restoration 3 times. 10% Loyalty Bonus annually. Mandatory copay 61+ entrants. | Batch 3 (2026-05-15): coverage breadth fields backfilled.

ambulance_cover.source_quote: road ambulance expenses up to Rs

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization: Domiciliary hospitalization means medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course would require care and treatment at a hospital but is actually taken while conﬁned at home und
